testsuite.name: com.carbooking.taskApp.api.tests.CarCategoriesTest

testcase.name: testGetCarCategories_ShouldContainExpectedCategories

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: There must be a category Luxury expected [true] but found [false]

[ { "id": 1, "name": "Economy", "description": "Small hatchbacks, low fuel consumption", "price_per_day": "50.00", "image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1549399542-7e3f8b79c341?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "created_at": "2026-03-13T12:57:35.782Z" }, { "id": 2, "name": "Comfort", "description": "Sedans with climate control and soft suspension", "price_per_day": "80.00", "image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1494976388531-d1058494cdd8?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "created_at": "2026-03-13T12:57:35.782Z" }, { "id": 3, "name": "Lux", "description": "Premium SUVs and sports cars", "price_per_day": "120.00", "image_url": "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1503376780353-7e6692767b70?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1200&q=80", "created_at": "2026-03-13T12:57:35.782Z" } ] HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Wed, 25 Mar 2026 17:00:39 GMT Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8 Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive access-control-allow-origin: * etag: W/"2f1-KgzNXR13iiZsGd9vGUR8VPpVUm8" x-powered-by: Express cf-cache-status: DYNAMIC Nel: {"report_to":"cf-nel","success_fraction":0.0,"max_age":604800} Report-To: {"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800,"endpoints":[{"url":"https://a.nel.cloudflare.com/report/v4?s=pN1ivqLHXEt2%2FTAoRlA5IJpOuixcr9PKMxrzdASzy7pSQdJ2FD5YE5ay3ht7bQvdMgDSTC9ozL8Rb96evSggFBb6M3QkzkCKtwZvUFH8IQ%3D%3D"}]} Content-Encoding: gzip Server: cloudflare CF-RAY: 9e1f791a78d49f4b-FRA alt-svc: h3=":443"; ma=86400
